chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.435 of 2024 Muhammad Aqeel Sarwar Versus Mrs. Asma Abbasi & another Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.2645/24 2. For orders on CMA No.2646/24 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No.2647/24 Dated: 15.10.2024 Mr. Yousuf Khan for appellant. -.-.- Learned counsel for the appellant, after arguing the matter at some length, realized appellant’s locus standi in the succession matter and submits that he would pursue his remedy for performance of the agreement against the legal heirs of the deceased, which shall be dealt with in accordance with law. The appeal merits no consideration and is accordingly dismissed along with listed applications. Chief Justice Judge
